    {% if transmittal.main_type == 'for_keep' %} Keep {% elif transmittal.main_type == 'for_return' %} Return {% else %} - {% endif %}

    {{ transmittal.description|truncatewords:5|default:"-" }}
    {{ transmittal.remarks|truncatewords:5|default:"-" }}
    {{ transmittal.created_at|date:"M d, Y g:i a"|default:"-" }}
    {{ transmittal.date_deadline|date:"M d, Y"|default:"-" }}
